html:
Exclusive to:

The Radish is a Vegetable Food Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. Radish can be Farmed by planting Seeds in a Farm. When eaten raw, Radish restore 12.5 Hunger and 1 Health. They take 15 days to spoil and can be used in a Crock Pot. Radish are required to make Spicy Vegetable Stinger.

Cooked Radish

Cooked Radish is obtained by cooking a Radish over a fire. It restores 2 more health than the raw version and takes 10 days to spoil.

Planted

Planted Radish' can most often be found growing naturally in the ground, but these won't respawn after being picked.

Usage

×1.5

By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

“Is spicy.”

“The color of my blood.”
–Wendy
“RED SPHERICAL BALLS OF ENERGY”
–WX-78
“Of the Brassicaceae family, I believe.”
–Wickerbottom
“Kinda tiny, aren't they?”
–Woodie
“A reddish radish.”
–Maxwell
“All evidence suggests I will not react well to its spiciness.”
–Wagstaff
“It hath nö use tö me!”
–Wigfrid
“These are kinda spicy.”
–Webber
“Radish-ical!”
–Walani
“I'm thinking a nice summer salad...”
–Warly
“Fer keepin' off the scurvy.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS A BALL O' NUM NUMS”
–Wilba
“Red balls for belly.”
–Wormwood
“Little Pew-matic pellets that came from the ground.”
–Wheeler
The Radish is a Vegetable Food Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. Radish can be Farmed by planting Seeds in a Farm. When eaten raw, Radish restore 12.5 Hunger and 1 Health. They take 15 days to spoil and can be used in a Crock Pot. Radish are required to make Spicy Vegetable Stinger.

“I wonder if this makes it tastes better.”
–Wilson
“Spicy. Like fire for your mouth.”
–Willow
“Is make Wolfgang breath big and strong.”
–Wolfgang
“It can't taste any worse when it's cooked.”
–Wendy
“ENERGY AQUIRED”
–WX-78
“A bit spicy for my taste.”
–Wickerbottom
“I have to eat my vegetables.”
–Woodie
“It's at least halfway appetizing.”
–Maxwell
“A tiny snack of cooked vegetables.”
–Wagstaff
“Fire döes nöthing tö impröve it!”
–Wigfrid
“This will make us grow up big and strong.”
–Webber
“Mmmm...”
–Walani
“Roasted with a touch of olive oil.”
–Warly
“A vegetable brew.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS A FWOOSH'DED BALL O' NUMS”
–Wilba
“Where green part go?”
–Wormwood
“Spicy! I like it!”
–Wheeler
Cooked Radish is obtained by cooking a Radish over a fire. It restores 2 more health than the raw version and takes 10 days to spoil.

“It's trying to hide.”
–Wilson
“What are they hiding from?”
–Willow
“Little vegetable...Wolfgang see you...”
–Wolfgang
“I feel like hiding in the ground, too.”
–Wendy
“IT CANNOT HIDE FROM ME”
–WX-78
“Radish plants work quite well as a companion plant.”
–Wickerbottom
“I think that's food, Lucy.”
–Woodie
“I see you, food!”
–Maxwell
“The unmistakable leaves of an edible root vegetable.”
–Wagstaff
“Stay in the gröund!”
–Wigfrid
“Hey little guy.”
–Webber
“A radish. Rad!”
–Walani
“What ravishing radishes!”
–Warly
“Arrgh. Litt'le buried treasures.”
–Woodlegs
“YON NUM NUMS IS'T HIDING”
–Wilba
“See you hiding!”
–Wormwood
“Those look like radishes!”
–Wheeler
Planted Radish' can most often be found growing naturally in the ground, but these won't respawn after being picked.

The '''Radish''' is a [[Vegetable]] [[Food]] [[Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. Radish can be [[Farming|Farmed]] by planting [[Seeds]] in a [[Farm]]. When eaten raw, Radish restore 12.5 [[Hunger]] and 1 [[Health]]. They take 15 days to [[spoil]] and can be used in a [[Crock Pot]]. Radish are required to make [[Spicy Vegetable Stinger]].
